title: Update Database Schema Page with enhanced card layout (description, PK/FK labels)

requirements.text: Update `frontend/src/pages/DatabaseSchemaPage.tsx` so that each of the 10 table cards (Users, Doctors, Specialties, Doctor_Schedules, Appointments, Payments, Reviews, Medical_Records, Corporate_Accounts, Subscriptions) displays the following hardcoded content in order: (1) Table Name as a bold heading, (2) a one-line plain-English description of the table's purpose, (3) a field list where each row shows 'Column Name – Data Type', (4) the Primary Key field clearly labelled (e.g., with a 'PK' badge or inline label), and (5) any Foreign Key fields clearly labelled with a 'FK' badge or inline label indicating the referenced table. All content must remain hardcoded JSX — no .map(), no useState, no useEffect, no hooks, no external library imports beyond React and Tailwind CSS classes. The component must remain a single self-contained default-export functional component with no props, no routing logic, no backend calls, and no animations. Styling must follow the existing Medical Blue theme using Tailwind utility classes consistent with the rest of the application.

quotes: Display 10 database tables as simple clean cards using hardcoded HTML/JSX.
Each card must include: Table Name (bold heading), Short description (1 line), Field list (Column Name – Data Type), Primary Key label, Foreign Key labels (if applicable)

acceptanceCriteria: All 10 table cards are rendered: Users, Doctors, Specialties, Doctor_Schedules, Appointments, Payments, Reviews, Medical_Records, Corporate_Accounts, Subscriptions.
Each card displays the table name as a bold heading.
Each card displays a single-line description of the table's purpose.
Each card lists all fields in 'Column Name – Data Type' format.
The Primary Key field on each card is clearly labelled with a 'PK' indicator.
All Foreign Key fields on each card are clearly labelled with a 'FK' indicator and the referenced table name.
No .map(), conditional rendering, hooks (useState, useEffect, useRef, etc.), or external library imports beyond React and Tailwind are present in the file.
All content is hardcoded JSX — no dynamic rendering or computed values.
Styling uses Tailwind utility classes consistent with the Medical Blue theme used elsewhere in the application.
The component is a single default-export functional component with no props.

constraints: All content in DatabaseSchemaPage.tsx must be hardcoded JSX — no .map(), no dynamic rendering, no computed values.
No hooks (useState, useEffect, useRef, etc.) may be used.
No external library imports beyond React itself and Tailwind CSS classes.
No routing logic, no backend or API calls, no database connections.
Do not edit any file listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Adding real database connectivity or live schema introspection.
Adding routing or navigation to/from DatabaseSchemaPage beyond what already exists.
Creating reusable sub-components for the table cards.
Adding state management or interactive features (search, filter, expand/collapse).
Changing any other page or component outside of DatabaseSchemaPage.tsx.
